summary: Tested Phase 2 Review Follow-Up Campaign with Smart Auto-Complete feature. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Verified: 1) review_followup prebuilt template exists with 2 steps (Day 2 + Day 3), 2) auto_create_tag=true creates tags automatically, 3) 'Review Sent' tag triggers campaign enrollment, 4) Tag normalization works (space to underscore), 5) Smart auto-complete fires on review link click, 6) Enrollment is marked completed with reason='review_link_clicked'

e2e_verification.smart_auto_complete: VERIFIED - enrollment status changed from 'active' to 'completed' with completed_reason='review_link_clicked' when customer clicked review link
e2e_verification.campaign_enrollment: VERIFIED - assigning 'Review Sent' tag auto-creates Review Follow-Up campaign and enrolls contact
e2e_verification.tag_auto_create: VERIFIED - auto_create_tag=true creates tag if it doesn't exist

2_tag_auto_create: POST /api/tags/{userId}/assign with auto_create_tag=true creates tag if not exists
POST /api/tags/{userId}/assign with auto_create_tag=false returns 404 for nonexistent tag
3_campaign_auto_enrollment: Assigning 'Review Sent' tag triggers campaign enrollment
next_send_at is set to 2 days from enrollment
4_smart_auto_complete: On review_link_clicked event, active review enrollments are auto-completed
Enrollment status changes to 'completed' with completed_reason='review_link_clicked'
Pending sends for the campaign are deleted
Related tasks are marked as completed

seed_data_creation: Test contacts created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Review Follow-Up Campaign with Smart Auto-Complete is fully verified. The 6 prebuilt templates are: sold_followup, be_back_nurture, service_reminder, referral_thank_you, vip_customer_care, review_followup. The review_followup template has trigger_tag='review_sent'. When a contact clicks a review link (via short_urls redirect), their active review campaign enrollment is auto-completed with completed_reason='review_link_clicked'. The smart auto-complete also cleans up pending sends and marks related tasks as completed.
